name: ML Engineer
tagline: Turn models into products that hold up in the real world.
description: Mathematics, modeling, and the engineering discipline to run ML in production.

milestones.title: Math for ML
milestones.learning_goal: Build the linear algebra, calculus, and probability intuition ML rests on.

weekend_project.title: Gradient Descent from Scratch
weekend_project.brief: Implement optimization by hand and visualize it.

milestones.reflection_prompt: What does the gradient actually point toward?

milestones.title: Classical ML
milestones.learning_goal: Master the models that still win most real problems.

weekend_project.title: Kaggle Baseline
weekend_project.brief: Enter a competition and beat the median with classical models.

milestones.reflection_prompt: Why did the simple model win?

milestones.title: Deep Learning
milestones.learning_goal: Train neural networks and understand why they work.

weekend_project.title: Fine-Tuned Model
weekend_project.brief: Fine-tune a pretrained model on a custom dataset.

milestones.title: Data-Centric ML
milestones.learning_goal: Improve models by improving data, not just architecture.

weekend_project.title: Data Quality Sprint
weekend_project.brief: Improve a model only by fixing its data.

milestones.reflection_prompt: Which 5% of data caused most errors?

milestones.title: Serving & MLOps

weekend_project.title: Production Model Service
weekend_project.brief: Deploy, monitor, and A/B test a live model.

milestones.reflection_prompt: How do you retrain without regressing?

milestones.title: Reading Research
milestones.learning_goal: Read papers critically and reproduce results.

weekend_project.title: Reproduce a Paper
weekend_project.brief: Reproduce a paper's core result and report gaps.

milestones.reflection_prompt: Where did reality diverge from the paper?
